name: /standards-diff prints a diff between the current standard snapshot and the upstream fetched version
command:
mkdir -p standards/snapshots && printf 'rule-1: keep
' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml && printf 'rule-1: keep
rule-2: new
' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-diff.sh" --source owasp-asvs --current standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml --upstream standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'added: rule-2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
